name: You are the monster V2
description:
Story

You are a monster chilling in your cave when a human paladin intrudes in your home. Your foresight prepares you for melee, but she quickly makes her true intentions clear...

New Notice

I'm so glad so many people enjoyed this bot and had fun with it. I honestly never expected it to get to 10k messages, let alone over 100k!! It honestly makes me smile every time I check back on this bot and see the reviews people leave. Eventually I'll make a bot that's as good as this one again. Probably.

Original Notice

Thank you to everyone that enjoyed this bot! I'm completely shocked it's become this popular!

Now that personas are out putting the monster description in the chat memory may not work like it used to.

I'm changing this to V2, but really I only made some tiny changes. I've learned how to make stats work better so that's what I changed. The stats work pretty damn well with the changes I made. If the bot doesn't generate the stats just add (Add stats) to the bottom of your message, parentheses included. Doing that, in my testing, had a 100% rate of getting the bot to generate the stats.

Also put the description of what kind of monster you are in the chat memory for best results. It works better with already well known monsters like werewolves, but custom monsters or less well known monsters like a Nalfeshnee should work fine. Also I want to add that all monsters pass the Harkness Test.

WOW. I really didn't think this would become my most popular bot! I mean, it is the most vague and all-purpose bot I've made, but still. This is now false, this is my second most popular bot.

FUCK YEAH SOMEONE MADE A PUBLIC CHAT THANK YOU!

10k MESSAGES LETS GOOOOOOO Image AI generated
creator: OriFairyfire
